name: banner
title: Banner
description: Intent-colored message bar. Supports floating toast mode with auto-dismiss and fade-out animation.

floating.description: Renders at a fixed position (centered top) and auto-dismisses after 4 s.

header.description: Renders the diagonal-stripe accent bar above the body.

floating.description: Renders at a fixed position (centered top) and auto-dismisses after 4 s.

header.description: Renders the diagonal-stripe accent bar above the body.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
